items.title: RE - crisis support reusable
items.scope: frontend — migrate RE - crisis support (bTIdW/bTIda): card shell with coaching disclaimer and three hotline resource rows (988, Crisis Text Line, SAMHSA); export shared CrisisSupportCard.vue for dashboard (bTIfU), paths enrollment (bTIwu), and settings consumers; presentation-only with tel/sms deep links; no adapter and no writes under project/
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: CrisisSupportCard.vue root renders with data-bubble-id="bTIdW"; card container bTIdb preserves column layout, 12px border-radius, 1px var(--color_primary_default) border, 20px padding, and var(--color_surface_default) bgcolor from IR

AC-2: Header row bTIdg shows heart icon bTIdi on primary circle bTIdh, title bTIdm ("Crisis Resources"), and disclaimer bTIdn using Text_caption_ with IR copy; hotline list bTIdo is a wrapping row of three resource groups with 8px row gaps and fit_width fluid semantics

AC-3: Hotline groups bTIds (988), bTIeA (Crisis Text Line), and bTIeL (SAMHSA) preserve icon+title+subtitle hierarchy with IR static text (bTIdy/bTIdz, bTIeG/bTIeK, bTIeR/bTIeS) and phosphor icons bTIdt/bTIeE/bTIeM; rows expose tel:988, sms:741741?body=HOME, and tel:18006624357 anchors without altering visible copy
items.layout_notes: Tiny reusable (~22 entities): vertical card stack — header row (icon circle + title/disclaimer column) above horizontal/wrapping hotline row. Each hotline group is icon column + title/subtitle text stack. Exported from frontend/src/components/crisis for CustomElement mounts bTIfU (dashboard), bTIwu (paths FG-services), bTIfw (bTGNJ), and bTIfa (sidebar def); DASH-07 and MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS import this shared component rather than duplicating markup.
